criteria.name: Mermaid Syntax Validation
criteria.description: Diagram must pass `mermaid -v 10.6.0 -c c1-context.md --validate` with exit code 0 and zero warnings. No deprecated C4 syntax (e.g., `]`) allowed.

criteria.name: C4 Level 1 Component Completeness
criteria.description: Must include exactly: (1) System boundary 'llm-switch' with <<System>> container, (2) User roles 'Developer' and 'Operations', (3) System components 'Nomad orchestrator', 'Consul service discovery', 'Vault secret management', (4) Local models: 'Qwen 7B GGUF', 'Nemotron-3-22B', (5) Frontier API: 'OpenAI gpt-4-turbo', (6) Internal systems: 'Orchestrator Model (1B)', 'Statistical Routing'. All 8 components required for pass.

criteria.name: Narrative Quality Metrics
criteria.description: Narrative must contain exactly 300 words (±10%), zero Grammarly API errors (score ≥95), and ≥85% active voice sentences as measured by NLTK passive voice detection. Must explicitly reference PRD Section 4.2 User Journeys.

criteria.name: PRD Traceability Matrix
criteria.description: Must include markdown table mapping each of the 8 diagram components to specific PRD section (format: 'Section X.Y, Page Z'). All User Journey steps from PRD Sections 4.2.1-4.2.3 must be explicitly linked to diagram elements.

criteria.name: Relationship Label Specificity
criteria.description: All connection labels must be ≥25 characters, follow format 'Protocol: <Source> performs <Action> on <Destination>' (e.g., 'HTTPS: Developers send OpenAPI requests to llm-switch'), and include latency bounds (e.g., '<50ms'). Generic labels ('uses', 'connects to') are rejected.

criteria.name: Technology Version Compliance
criteria.description: Must specify exact versions: Golang 1.21+, Docker 24.0+, Nomad 1.7.0+, Consul 1.16.0+, Vault 1.15.0+. Internal systems must be labeled as <<System>> containers. No generic 'Docker container' without image tag.

criteria.name: Model Routing Edge Cases
criteria.description: Must show dashed fallback lines for: (a) Local model unavailability → Frontier API with label 'Failover on latency >100ms', (b) Vault token expiry → Auto-refresh with label '401 → Token Refresh'. Must include latency annotations for all model paths.

criteria.name: Security Boundary Delineation
criteria.description: Must draw dashed <<Boundary>> container around 'Vault' and 'Consul' labeled 'Trusted Zone (mTLS Required)'. Must draw solid <<Boundary>> around 'Public Internet' with annotation 'TLS 1.3 Termination'. No internal service exposed to Public Internet boundary.

criteria.name: Cluster Environment Specificity
criteria.description: Narrative must reference: Prometheus metrics endpoint '/metrics', Grafana dashboard ID 'llm-switch-overview', hardware-aware routing strategy 'memory-priority' from supplementary context Section 3.1, and Kubernetes Node Affinity constraints for GPU scheduling.
